description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard with a rectangular, low-profile chassis and rounded keycaps. The keys are arranged in a standard layout, including a function row, alphanumeric section, and a dedicated number pad on the right. The keycaps are colored in a gradient of pastel shades, ranging from pinks and purples to oranges and yellows, giving the keyboard a visually striking and playful appearance. The surface appears to be made of smooth plastic, with each keycap slightly raised above the main body. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached to the keyboard, and no brand logo is present on the surface. The overall design is modern and clean, suitable for both office and casual urban environments.
description: A pastel-colored, full-size keyboard with rounded keycaps and a smooth plastic finish, featuring a standard layout and number pad. The design is modern, playful, and visually striking.
description_view_0: The keyboard is seen from the front, showing the full width and the colorful gradient of the keycaps.
description_view_1: Viewed from the left side, the staggered rows of keys and the low-profile chassis are visible.
description_view_2: The keyboard is shown from the back, highlighting the rear edge and the continuation of the pastel color scheme.
description_view_3: From the right side, the number pad and the overall slim profile of the keyboard are apparent.
